results.name: bootstrap
results.notes: Bootstrap's $primary/$danger/$success/$warning/$info aliases resolve at compile time to $blue/$red/$green/$yellow/$cyan; we read those directly. The tint-color($blue, 80%) pre-computation Bootstrap uses for soft accent variants is not evaluated by this pipeline — we substitute an OKLCH approximation of that lightness/chroma. Phase 3.5d composite refinement: shadow recipes match Bootstrap 5.3's $box-shadow variants verbatim.
